plugins.name: browser-manager
plugins.description: Browser automation and inspection via Chrome DevTools MCP — navigate, click, fill forms, inspect network traffic and console logs

plugins.name: my-serena
plugins.description: Semantic coding tools via MCP — symbol search, code navigation, file editing, and codebase exploration for Claude Code

plugins.name: session-closer
plugins.description: Development session closing — capture implementation summaries, record decisions, and sync project documentation when wrapping up work sessions

plugins.name: code-researcher
plugins.description: Codebase research and pattern discovery — investigate code patterns, locate references, find similar implementations, and provide placement guidance for new code

plugins.name: database
plugins.description: Database inspection and querying via dbhub MCP — explore schemas, run SQL queries, write migrations, and connect to databases

plugins.name: docs-researcher
plugins.description: External documentation lookup — find and present official docs for libraries, packages, tools, and APIs from the internet

plugins.name: brutal-critic
plugins.description: Uncompromising quality evaluator for code and text — auto-detects input type, evaluates against an 8/10 minimum standard, and produces structured PASS/FAIL reports with actionable improvements

plugins.name: software-development
plugins.description: Expert backend, frontend, and testing agents with TypeScript/Node.js specialization — SOLID principles, design patterns, React, Tailwind, strict typing, Vitest/Jest testing, and clean code practices

plugins.name: software-architect-nextjs
plugins.description: Next.js architect agent — MCP-powered documentation access, architectural planning, implementation delegation to software-developer agents, and post-implementation validation

plugins.name: software-architect
plugins.description: Framework-agnostic software architect — researches, plans, and validates before any code is written; delegates implementation to frontend/backend/tester agents and defers to software-architect-nextjs for Next.js projects
